features.description: Guardian catalogue + lifecycle. Available on every tier.
Medium+. Enables >1 guardian per athlete (split families, primary + secondary guardians). When off (Small), the observer refuses adding a second guardian.
Enterprise-only. Adds HR-manual verification with signed-document upload. When off, verification is silent-acceptance after 24h.

Enables the cross-module ConsentDelegationChain resolver. When AthleteGuardian is provisioned, this feature is on — the athlete module's consent_recorded_by_authorised_guardian rule uses it. Wave 3b hooks the hard-fail; Wave 3a soft-warns.
